title: leontodon hirtus
intro: Leontodon hirtus, also known as the hairy hawkbit, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. Leontodon hirtus has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and has also been used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
